## Checklist

- [ ] `cd api && bundle exec rspec && bundle exec rubocop` — green
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm test && npm run lint && npx tsc --noEmit` — green
- [ ] New user-facing strings have both EN and JA keys
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior described in README / SPEC.md / docs/ changed
- [ ] Follows the hard rules in AGENTS.md
